items.line_en: Storytime!

coach.say: Storytime!

items.line_en: Olivia's family had just moved to a new town.

coach.say: Olivia's family had just moved to a new town.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Olivia's family had just moved to a new town.

items.line_en: And Olivia had to go to a new school.

coach.say: And Olivia had to go to a new school.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And Olivia had to go to a new school.

items.line_en: She didn't know anyone in the new town.

coach.say: She didn't know anyone in the new town.
coach.hint: Chunk it: She didn't know anyone in the new town.

items.line_en: And she felt very nervous on the first day of school.

coach.say: And she felt very nervous on the first day of school.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And she felt very nervous on the first day of school.

items.line_en: I'm gonna feel lonely at the new school.

coach.say: I'm gonna feel lonely at the new school.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm gonna feel lonely at the new school.

items.line_en: I don't know anyone there.

coach.say: I don't know anyone there.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I don't know anyone there.

items.line_en: I won't have anyone to talk to or to play with.

coach.say: I won't have anyone to talk to or to play with.

items.line_en: Olivia always shared everything with her mother.

coach.say: Olivia always shared everything with her mother.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Olivia always shared everything with her mother.

items.line_en: And so she went up to her mother and told her how she was feeling.

coach.say: And so she went up to her mother and told her how she was feeling.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And so she went up to her mother and / told her how she was feeling.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Mom, / I don't feel like going to the new school.

items.line_en: I don't have any friends there.

coach.say: I don't have any friends there.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I don't have any friends there.

coach.say: What if they don't like me?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What if / they don't like me?

coach.say: Or let me play with them?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Or let me play with them?

items.line_en: Or let me be their friend.

items.line_en: Olivia's mother tried to calm her fears.

items.line_en: Don't worry, Olivia.

coach.say: Don't worry, Olivia.

items.line_en: I'm sure you'll come home with a smile.

coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm sure you'll come home with a smile.

items.line_en: Come on.

coach.say: Come on.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Come on.

items.line_en: Now let's go before the schoolbell rings.

coach.say: Now let's go before the schoolbell rings.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Now let's go before the schoolbell rings.
